northstar: Launch HSF Story Studio as a paid product

progress.goal: Launch HSF Story Studio as a paid product

at_the_door.title: App Store submission path (Apple Developer / TestFlight / submit)
at_the_door.why_founder: Apple identity + submission are irreducible founder gates (account, 2FA, legal attestation).
at_the_door.action: Archive+upload the signed build via Xcode/Fastlane to App Store Connect under Team K34GR8P326.

at_the_door.title: Redeploy relay-api with truthful provider_api_calls / founder_gated_execution
at_the_door.why_founder: Deploying to relay-001 is an infra publish act (SSH + docker on the live node).
at_the_door.action: scp infra/hoch-200/vps/relay-api/app.py to relay-001 and: docker compose build relay-api && docker compose up -d relay-api . Then curl /api/live and confirm provider_api_calls=OFF.

at_the_door.title: Expose HOCH NEURO tab in the production dashboard
at_the_door.why_founder: Adding the #react-neuro-root tab + rebuilding/deploying the frontend is a publish act.
at_the_door.action: Apply docs/generated/neuro/wiring_snippet.md to dashboard index.html, run frontend build (tsc && vite build), deploy. Panel is inert until #react-neuro-root exists.

at_the_door.title: Generate photoreal brain image (paid burst GPU)
at_the_door.why_founder: Image generation needs paid burst compute or a keyed image service — a spend action.
at_the_door.action: Run the spec in docs/generated/neuro/brain_image_spec.md on burst GPU (or approved image tool); place hoch-brain.png at frontend/public/assets/ and assets/. Panel auto-composites it.

at_the_door.title: Commit neuro panel + tests through the change board
at_the_door.why_founder: git commit/tag on the real repo runs on your Mac; push is a founder gate.
at_the_door.action: Run scripts/baseline_guard.py, commit hoch-neuro-*.{html,js}, frontend/src/{lib,components}/neuro/*, tests/test_hoch_neuro_derive.js, infra/.../app.py, then tag a new baseline.

at_the_door.title: Install Apple design tools on the Mac (Icon Composer, SF Symbols 8, fonts, bezels)
at_the_door.why_founder: Downloading + installing .dmg tools on your Mac is an on-device install act.
at_the_door.action: Download from developer.apple.com/design/resources: Icon Composer (macOS Sequoia+), SF Symbols 8 beta, SF Pro/SF Mono/New York fonts, iPhone 17 + iPad Pro (M5) bezels. Install.

at_the_door.title: Produce Epic Fury Liquid Glass layered app icon
at_the_door.why_founder: Icon art + Xcode packaging is an on-device creative act on your Mac.
at_the_door.action: In Icon Composer build the 3-4 layer Epic Fury icon per docs/generated/apple/epic_fury_liquid_glass_refresh.md (light/dark/clear), export Epic-Fury.icon + flattened 1024 PNG. Ship in the next build (not this review).

at_the_door.title: Produce Epic Fury screenshots in current bezels
at_the_door.why_founder: Capturing/rendering marketing screenshots is an on-device act; App Store upload is a founder gate.
at_the_door.action: Render the 6-frame set (per storyboard) in iPhone 17 / iPad Pro M5 bezels, captions sentence-case, then upload via App Store Connect at next submission.

at_the_door.title: Choose Epic Fury monetization model + set price in App Store Connect
at_the_door.why_founder: Pricing + monetization model is a founder money decision.
at_the_door.action: In App Store Connect pick model (paid up-front recommended for v1.0) and set the price tier per docs/revenue/epic_fury_pricing.md.

at_the_door.title: Sign Paid Apps agreement + confirm banking/tax
at_the_door.why_founder: Legal agreement + banking/tax are irreducible founder acts to receive money.
at_the_door.action: Accept the Paid Apps agreement in App Store Connect; confirm bank account + tax forms so sales can pay out.

at_the_door.title: Provision Story Studio Stripe live keys + payout bank
at_the_door.why_founder: Live payment keys + payout bank are founder credential/money acts.
at_the_door.action: Create Stripe live products/prices per docs/revenue/story_studio_stripe_spec.md, connect payout bank, provide live keys to the deploy (never in chat).

tech_scout: 2026-07-13 top pick: Claude Managed Agents 'Outcomes' (rubric + independent grader) — machine-checkable 'ready for the doorstep' gate. Digest: docs/scout/tech-scout-2026-07-13.md
